The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas Recap 12-2-2023
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping the latest Star Atlas news.
Metaverse Nomads #123 20% Chance of SOL flipping ETH? and Star Atlas News
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #108
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas Partners With Web3 Mogul Alex Becker, Neo Tokyo
Krigs published an article about Star Atlas partnering with Neo Tokyo.
STAR ATLAS announces End-of-Year Releases!!
Atlas Theory posted a video about Star Atlas end of the year product releases.
Star Atlas Has A Major Security Dilemma
Krigs published an article about security issues with guilds in Star Atlas.
The Atlas Brew #91
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
STAR ATLAS #212 KILL IT! Before it’s Too Late – URGENT MISSION
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
STAR ATLAS – Never Alone Mission 3 Has Arrived
Atlas Theory posted a video about the new mission in Star Atlas Never Alone campaign.
